ecarx.carext.vehicle.module

Interface ICharging


  • public interface ICharging
    充电管理

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int BATTERY_CHARGING_CURRENT_POWER
      Deprecated. 
      using android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#EV_BATTERY_INSTANTANEOUS_CHARGE_RATE instead --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
      static int BATTERY_DISCHARGING_CURRENT_POWER
      DISCHARGING POWER 当前放电功率,单位KW ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Float property type huaqiao.lu@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 15:36:48
      static int BATTERY_TYPE
      The type of battery currently used in the vehicle 当前车辆使用的电池类型 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_STATIC ICharging.BatteryType property type tao.zhan@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-14 13:48:31
      static int CHARGE_FUNC_CHARGING

      using android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#EV_CHARGE_TIME_REMAINING instead on android-13 --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
      static int CHARGING_GUN_LOCK
      charging gun electronic lock switch 充电枪电子锁开关 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type huaqiao.lu@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 15:32:35

      static int CHARGING_SOC
      Try to set charging SOC level, Float type in percentage 设置充电SOC(目标充电量) ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Float property type 0~100 huaqiao.lu@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 15:04:46

      The energy which the vehicle has already discharged 放电能量释放值 value: Float type Unit kwh ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Float property type tao.zhan@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-07-09 16:45:39
      static int DISCHARGING_SOC
      try to set dis-charging SOC level, Float type in percentage 设置放电SOC(目标放电量),百分比 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Float property type percentage 0~100 huaqiao.lu@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 15:33:56
      static int DISCHARGING_SWITCH_V2L
      Try to open/cancel V2L(Vehicle to Load) dis-charging<br> 开始或取消V2L(将动力电池的电给其他负载进行充电)放电<br> ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type huaqiao.lu@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 15:34:36

      to set the Energy regeneration level 能量回收等级设置，原ID为SETTING_FUNC_ENERGY_REGENERATION ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE ICharging.EnergyRegenerationLevel property type wei.jin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-19 11:07:12

      static int WPC_REMIND_PHONE_LEAVE_OVER

      static int WPC_WORK_MODE
      WPC(Wireless Phone Charging) Wireless charging panel switch WPC(Wireless Phone Charging)无线充电面板开关，开启后手机放置可进行无线充电，原ID：WPC_FUNC_WORK_MODE ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 13:43:19
